changelog:
Hotfix: data volume permission denied when migrating from upstream image.

A6 introduced USER 1000:1000 in the Dockerfile for security, which broke users upgrading from the upstream Quorinex image (which ran as root and wrote data/config.json owned by root). The new container couldn't read its own config and exited with 'permission denied'.

Fix: ditched the static USER directive in favour of an entrypoint shim that runs as root briefly, fixes /app/data ownership to uid 1000 if needed, then drops privileges via su-exec before exec'ing the binary. The application itself still never runs as root. Override with RUN_UID / RUN_GID env vars if a different non-root identity is required. tini stays as PID 1 for signal forwarding.

Users who hit the permission-denied error after upgrading can either pull A9 (auto-fix) or chown -R 1000:1000 their data folder once.

A8: dashboard credits use account-true quotaUsed.
A7: backend multi API keys with per-key daily limits.
A6: security + reliability hardening.
A5: drop Claude Code system prompt entirely when detected.
A4: drop ThinkingModePrompt; split filter chain.
A3: drop --- SYSTEM PROMPT --- markers; structured tool results only.
A2: kiro-go-patch container_name + pull_policy: always.
A1: <system-reminder>/x-anthropic-billing-header strip; /v1/responses; model id echo.
